stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: In a differential aileron system, the up-going aileron is deflected at a higher angle, and the down-going aileron is deflected at a smaller angle.
options.b: In a differential aileron system, the up-going aileron is deflected at a smaller angle, and the down-going aileron is deflected at a higher angle.
options.c: In a differential aileron system, the up-going and the down-going ailerons are deflected at the same angle.
options.d: In a differential aileron system, the down-going aileron is deflected at an angle which equals 10% of the up-going aileron.
